sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Atkore to pay shareholders $0.33-a-share cash dividend Feb. 27
feed.summary: Atkore Inc. (NYSE: ATKR) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share of common stock. The dividend will be payable on February 27, 2026, to shareholders on record by February 17, 2026. Atkore specializes in manufacturing electrical products for various applications, including commercial, industrial, data center, telecommunications, and solar.

feed.title: State Street Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Bannerman Energy
feed.summary: State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries have notified that they are no longer a substantial holder in Bannerman Energy Ltd as of January 27, 2026. This reduction in their stake below the substantial-shareholder threshold could impact the company's share register composition and suggests a shift in institutional ownership. Bannerman Energy (AU:BMN) operates in the uranium-focused energy sector and currently holds a "Hold" rating from analysts with an A$4.00 price target.

feed.title: OneWater Marine Inc. (NASDAQ:ONEW) Given Consensus Rating of "Hold" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Brokerages have issued a consensus "Hold" rating for OneWater Marine Inc. (NASDAQ:ONEW), with an average one-year price target of $17.00. Institutional investors own 94.32% of the stock, and many have recently adjusted their holdings. The company currently trades around $13.22, showing mixed performance metrics and meaningful leverage.

feed.title: Southern Copper (NYSE:SCCO) Shares Set to Split on Tuesday, February 10th
feed.summary: Southern Copper (NYSE:SCCO) announced a 1.0085-for-1 stock split to become effective on February 10th, with new shares distributed after market close on February 9th. The company also increased its quarterly dividend to $1.00 per share, implying a 2.0% yield and a 75.47% payout ratio. Despite recent strong earnings beats and favorable copper demand, concerns linger over management's guidance of lower output in 2027–28 and mixed analyst sentiment.

feed.title: TJX Stock Falls -6.1% With A 7-day Losing Spree On Retail Sector Fears
feed.summary: TJX stock experienced a significant 6.1% drop, extending its losing streak to seven consecutive days. This decline is attributed to growing fears surrounding the retail sector, impacting investor confidence in the company.

feed.title: Is 21.0% Fall In Opendoor Technologies (OPEN) Stock A Buying Opportunity?
feed.summary: The article title asks whether a 21.0% fall in Opendoor Technologies (OPEN) stock presents a buying opportunity. However, the provided content is solely boilerplate website navigation, legal disclaimers, and technical model limitations, offering no actual analysis or information regarding Opendoor Technologies or its stock performance. The article content is incomplete and does not deliver on the premise of its title.

feed.title: Currency Hedged ETFs Could Be Interesting U.S. Election Plays
feed.summary: Ahead of the first presidential debate, investors are considering currency-hedged ETFs like HEDJ and DXJ as potential plays on U.S. election volatility. Goldman Sachs suggests the U.S. dollar could strengthen, particularly under certain election outcomes, benefiting these funds. The debate's early timing could lead to market reactions sooner than usual, making hedges a timely consideration.

feed.title: A Look At General Electric’s Valuation After Strong 2025 Results And Growing Aerospace And Vernova Order Momentum
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) reported strong 2025 full-year results with US$45.9b revenue and US$8.7b net income, yet its shares saw a short-term decline. Despite this pullback, the stock is considered 13.9% undervalued with a fair value of $339.69, driven by significant productivity gains and increased free cash flow. The article suggests that while longer-term momentum remains strong, with a 1-year total shareholder return of 47.74%, investors should consider the P/E ratio and other risks before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Is There Now An Opportunity In Pfizer (PFE) After Recent Pandemic Demand Reset?
feed.summary: Pfizer's stock appears undervalued according to Simply Wall St's analysis, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggesting a 56.8% discount from its intrinsic value and its P/E ratio being lower than both the industry and its estimated Fair Ratio. The company's recent repositioning post-pandemic demand and its product pipeline are key factors influencing investor perception, making it a potential opportunity for long-term investors. Simply Wall St encourages investors to use its "Narratives" tool to customize their valuation based on their own outlook for the company's future financials.

feed.title: HIVE Digital Technologies (TSXV:HIVE) Is Down 9.7% After Analyst Downgrade And Governance Proposals - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: HIVE Digital Technologies (TSXV:HIVE) has seen its stock price decline by nearly 10% following an analyst downgrade and the release of materials for its upcoming annual meeting. The downgrade questions the returns on HIVE's Bitcoin mining build-out and its AI cloud services positioning, despite strong Bitcoin production and planned capacity expansion. Investors are now weighing these concerns against the company's growth plans and existing risks like capital efficiency and equity issuance.

feed.title: Ford Energy Launch Adds New Dimension To Ford Motor Valuation Story
feed.summary: Ford Motor has launched a new battery energy storage business, Ford Energy, appointing Lisa Drake as its president. The company will repurpose its BlueOval SK plant in Kentucky to manufacture battery storage systems, signaling Ford's expansion into broader energy solutions beyond electric vehicles. This strategic move introduces a new segment for investors to monitor, providing an additional dimension to Ford's valuation within the electrification and energy infrastructure markets.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE NEXT WEEK: Blue Owl Capital Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Blue Owl Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP announces an investor deadline of February 2, 2026, for purchasers of Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) securities to seek appointment as lead plaintiff in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Blue Owl concealed liquidity issues, pressure on its asset base from BDC redemptions, and the likelihood of limiting or halting BDC redemptions, leading to stock price declines. Investors who suffered substantial losses during the Class Period (February 6, 2025, to November 16, 2025) are encouraged to come forward.

feed.title: Is Clorox (CLX) Offering Value After A Mixed Share Price Performance?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Clorox (CLX) to determine if its current share price of US$108.80 offers value after mixed share price performance. Using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis, Simply Wall St suggests the stock is approximately 49.0% undervalued with an intrinsic value of $213.36 per share. However, when comparing its P/E ratio of 16.8x to Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 16.0x, the stock appears slightly overvalued on an earnings basis.

feed.title: Xcel Energy plans measures to reduce power outages across Colorado, make grid more resilient
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is planning to implement new measures to reduce power outages and enhance the resilience of the electric grid across Colorado. Recent outages have highlighted the inconvenience and significant costs associated with disruptions, prompting experts to explore various preventative options. While solutions like burying power lines are being considered, some of these options are projected to be substantially more expensive than others.

feed.title: McEwen Mining (MUX) to Acquire Golden Lake Exploration
feed.summary: McEwen Mining (MUX) announced its strategic acquisition of Golden Lake Exploration (GOLXF) through a court-approved plan of arrangement, offering Golden Lake shareholders a 60% premium. This move aims to expand McEwen's asset portfolio, particularly with Golden Lake's Jewel Ridge projects near McEwen's Gold Bar Mine Complex. While the acquisition presents growth opportunities, investors are cautioned to consider McEwen Mining's mixed financial health and valuation metrics, such as a low Altman Z-Score and high P/S and P/B ratios.

feed.title: CVS Pharmacy Review 2026: Why This Everyday Drugstore Is Quietly Becoming a Health Hub
feed.summary: CVS Pharmacy is transforming from a basic drugstore into a comprehensive health and wellness hub, offering prescriptions, vaccinations, minor care, and everyday essentials both in-store and through a robust digital platform. This integration aims to simplify healthcare and daily errands, providing convenience for busy individuals despite occasional user complaints about wait times and service inconsistency. The company's strategy focuses on nationwide accessibility, digital tools, and rewards programs to cater to a demographic seeking streamlined health management.

feed.title: Kazakhstan says Chevron promises Tengiz will be operated reliably and safely
feed.summary: Kazakhstan announced that Chevron has committed to ensuring the reliable and safe operation of its facilities at the Tengiz oilfield. This assurance comes after three electrical fires earlier this month temporarily halted production and caused a loss of 7.2 million barrels of oil. Chevron management provided details on measures to address the incidents and prevent future occurrences, focusing on a gradual increase in oil production.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Marina Bay Sands ...
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, highlighting a record EBITDA of $806 million for Marina Bay Sands, driven by strong mass gaming and slot win. Conversely, Macao's EBITDA of $608 million was below expectations due to increased promotional activity, higher operating expenses, and a base mass market that has not returned to pre-pandemic levels. The company repurchased $500 million in stock and increased its ownership in Sands China Limited, demonstrating capital return and strategic investment despite Macao's underperformance.

feed.title: IBM Showcases Vision for Quantum With New Research. How Nvidia and AMD Fit in the Picture.
feed.summary: IBM is presenting its vision for the future of quantum computing, suggesting a collaborative rather than competitive relationship with current supercomputers. The article touches upon how companies like Nvidia and AMD might fit into this evolving technological landscape.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Inc (RJF) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenues and ...
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial Inc (RJF) reported record net revenues of $3.7 billion for fiscal first quarter 2026, with an annualized return on common equity of 18%. The Private Client Group achieved record revenues, though Capital Markets experienced a decline due to lower M&A activity. The firm expanded its asset management capabilities with the acquisition of Clark Capital Management.

feed.title: Is Edison International’s (EIX) 22-Year Dividend Streak Reframing Its Capital Allocation Story?
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) recently increased its quarterly dividend by 6%, extending its dividend growth streak to 22 years, which management views as a sign of financial confidence. While this reinforces the company's income-focused investment profile, it doesn't fundamentally change the risk-reward, as concerns persist regarding dividend coverage, earnings quality, and interest coverage. The article suggests that despite the dividend hike, investors should consider the potential undervaluation, the wide range of fair value estimates, and underlying financial risks.

feed.title: Joby Stock Dives After The Bell: Here's Why
feed.summary: Joby Aviation (NYSE: JOBY) shares fell after hours following the company's announcement of a proposed offering of convertible senior notes and common stock, aiming to raise $1 billion. The proceeds are intended to fund certification and manufacturing efforts as well as prepare for commercial operations. Joby had approximately $978.1 million in cash as of September 30, 2025.

feed.title: The 3 Best Vegan Stocks to Buy Now
feed.summary: This article identifies the top three vegan-friendly stocks, considering the broader plant-based food industry. It highlights the Global X AgTech & Food Innovation ETF (KROP) for diversified exposure, Corteva (CTVA) for its agricultural solutions that support crop health and yields, and Lindsay (LNN) for its essential irrigation products crucial for plant-based food production. The author clarifies that "vegan" and "plant-based" are used interchangeably for investment purposes, focusing on companies that facilitate animal-free products.

feed.title: Junior Achievement opens 40,000-SF HQ and learning facility named after Phillips 66 (PHOTOS)
feed.summary: Junior Achievement has opened its new 40,000-square-foot headquarters and learning facility, named the Phillips 66 JA Discovery Center, in Houston. The facility opened ahead of schedule on January 27, 2026, and is designed to equip children with entrepreneurial and business skills. The nonprofit credits aggressive construction timelines and strong partnerships for the early opening.

feed.title: Infosys Unveils AI-First Innovations and Accessibility Features for Australian Open 2026
feed.summary: Infosys has announced new AI-powered innovations for the Australian Open 2026, focusing on enhanced accessibility and fan engagement. Key features include "MatchFeel" tactile technology for visually impaired fans, an interactive AI mascot named Rally, and "Keys to the Match" for simplified analytics. These developments leverage Infosys Topaz AI suite and reinforce the company's commitment to responsible AI and its partnership with Tennis Australia.

feed.title: Coca-Cola India Enables Hydration Access and Retail Empowerment at Asia's Largest Tribal Festival
feed.summary: Coca-Cola India is supporting Medaram Jatara 2026, Asia's largest tribal festival, by providing extensive hydration access, empowering local retailers, and implementing community-led waste management initiatives. Through its 'Locally Yours' program, the company is creating economic opportunities for local communities and ensuring seamless refreshment availability for millions of pilgrims, while also promoting responsible waste disposal and the reuse of plastic waste.

feed.title: Progress Software Corporation (PRGS) Appoints Ed Keisling as Chief AI Officer to Drive AI Strategy and Innovation
feed.summary: Progress Software Corporation (PRGS) has appointed Ed Keisling as its first Chief AI Officer, a newly created role to accelerate the company's AI initiatives. Keisling will lead the integration of AI across Progress' product portfolio, focusing on enhancing customer experience and driving innovation. This strategic move highlights Progress' commitment to leveraging AI for business transformation and maintaining a competitive edge.

feed.title: LI AUTO-W Undergoes Structural Adjustment, Restructures R&D System into 3 Major Teams to Enhance Robot Development: Rumor
feed.summary: LI AUTO-W (02015.HK) is reportedly undergoing a new round of organizational restructuring within its R&D system, reorganizing it into three main teams: Base Model, Software Ontology, and Hardware Ontology. This adjustment aims to enhance robot development, with the former autonomous driving team being split, and its senior vice president now heading the Hardware Ontology Team primarily focused on robotics. The autonomous driving team will be integrated into the Software Ontology Team, led by the Vice President of Intelligent Space.

feed.title: Longmont defense contractor nLight expands
feed.summary: nLight, a Longmont defense contractor specializing in high-energy laser manufacturing, has expanded its operations by adding 50,000 square feet of space. This move aims to increase its manufacturing capabilities for defense-related technologies. The article notes that full details are accessible to subscribers only.

feed.title: Southern Copper Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Southern Copper (NYSE: SCCO) announced record financial results for 2025, with net sales of $13.4 billion, adjusted EBITDA of $7.8 billion, and net income of $4.3 billion. The company provided 2026 copper production guidance of 911,400 tons and detailed its $20.5 billion capital investment program, including progress on the Tia Maria project. Despite a projected slight decline in copper production in 2026, Southern Copper anticipates a rising scarcity premium for copper, maintaining a strong outlook for the metal driven by demand from EVs and AI.

feed.title: Jupiter Neurosciences launches support initiative for GLP-1 users By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jupiter Neurosciences (NASDAQ:JUNS) has launched an initiative to support individuals using GLP-1 weight loss therapies through its Nugevia consumer longevity product line. The company aims to address biological challenges like mitochondrial energy demands, lean tissue preservation, and neuro-gut inflammatory balance associated with GLP-1 use. This initiative aligns with their strategy combining a clinical-stage pharmaceutical pipeline with a direct-to-consumer longevity business, using their proprietary JOTROL formulation to potentially mitigate side effects like "Ozempic face" and improve overall health for GLP-1 users.

feed.title: Hawthorn Bancshares Announces Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: HWBK) announced an increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.21 per common share, marking a 5% rise from the previous dividend. This dividend is payable on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 15, 2026. Hawthorn Bancshares, headquartered in Jefferson City, Missouri, is the parent company of Hawthorn Bank, which has a 160-year history of serving families and businesses.

feed.title: Analysts Conflicted on These Financial Names: First Financial Bankshares (FFIN), Texas Capital Bancshares (TCBI) and Assurant (AIZ)
feed.summary: This article details recent analyst ratings for three financial companies: First Financial Bankshares (FFIN), Texas Capital Bancshares (TCBI), and Assurant (AIZ). KBW analysts maintained a "Hold" rating on FFIN and a "Buy" rating on TCBI, while BMO Capital maintained a "Buy" rating on AIZ. The report includes price targets, success rates of the analysts, and an overview of the consensus ratings for each stock.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies stock hits 52-week low at $421.26 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (TYL) stock recently hit a 52-week low of $421.26, reflecting a 31.25% decline over the past year despite the company's "GOOD" financial health and 10.62% revenue growth. While the P/E ratio is high, analysts from Piper Sandler, Goldman Sachs, Stifel, Oppenheimer, and TD Cowen maintain positive outlooks with Buy or Outperform ratings and significant price targets, suggesting the stock may be undervalued. This indicates that the current low might be a temporary setback rather than a long-term trend, driven by strong fundamentals and growth prospects in government technology solutions.

feed.title: Intuitive surgical EVP Curet sells $122,500 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Myriam Curet, EVP and Chief Medical Officer at Intuitive Surgical Inc (ISRG), sold 230 shares of the company's common stock for $122,500 on January 27, 2026, while also exercising options for 230 shares valued at $50,198. This transaction was part of a compliant Trading Plan. The news follows strong Q4 2025 results for Intuitive Surgical, with revenues up 19% year-over-year and analyst firms reiterating positive outlooks and increased price targets for the company due to its performance and the upcoming launch of the da Vinci 5 surgical system.

feed.title: IBM’s Robust Software Portfolio Has Become Its Main Growth Engine
feed.summary: IBM's strategy to expand its software business has been successful, making its robust software portfolio the main growth engine. The company leverages its leadership in hybrid cloud to help enterprise customers modernize their IT infrastructure while preserving stability and security. This approach positions IBM as a trustworthy partner in an evolving technological landscape.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: Church & Dwight (CHD) Reports Q4 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) is set to report its Q4 results this Friday, with analysts expecting revenue growth of 3.7% year-on-year to $1.64 billion and adjusted earnings of $0.83 per share. The company has a mixed record on revenue estimates, missing twice in the last two years. Sentiment in the household products sector is positive, with Church & Dwight's shares up 7.8% over the past month.

feed.title: Nvidia, Others in Talks for OpenAI Investment, Information Says
feed.summary: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Amazon are reportedly in talks to invest a combined up to $60 billion in OpenAI, as part of a larger funding round aiming for $100 billion. Nvidia is considering an investment of up to $30 billion, while Microsoft's contribution could be less than $10 billion, and Amazon, a new investor, might commit over $10 billion.

feed.title: At Australian Open 2026, AI lets blind fans feel every rally
feed.summary: Infosys and Tennis Australia are introducing AI-first experiences at the Australian Open 2026 to enhance fan engagement and accessibility, making tennis more inclusive. Key innovations include MatchFeel, a tactile haptic system for visually impaired fans, and Rally, an interactive AI mascot. The Infosys Fan Zone will also host a Future Leaders Program, focusing on digital skills and generative AI for students.

feed.title: Enphase Reports 98% Firefighter Endorsement for Microinverter Solar Systems Following SAFE Training Programme
feed.summary: Enphase Energy announced that 98% of firefighters who completed its Solar and Fire Education (SAFE) training would recommend microinverter-based solar systems due to their enhanced safety and design. The training highlights how Enphase's microinverter architecture creates all-AC systems at the panel level, eliminating high-voltage DC runs and integrating rapid shutdown technology, thus improving safety for first responders during emergencies. This initiative aims to equip firefighters with the necessary knowledge to confidently manage evolving energy technologies.

feed.title: HP Papier by International Paper: The Surprisingly Emotional Upgrade Your Printer Has Been Waiting F
feed.summary: The article discusses HP Papier, HP-branded office paper produced by International Paper, as a significant upgrade for printers. It highlights how this paper, designed to work seamlessly with printer systems, can reduce common printing frustrations like jams, streaky prints, and dull colors. The piece emphasizes HP Papier's reliability, consistent performance, and responsible production as key benefits for both homes and offices.

feed.title: AMD (Advanced Micro Devices, Inc., NASDAQ) 28 Jan 2026: Earnings preview for Feb 3, watch AI revenue
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is set to report earnings on February 3, 2026, with investors keenly watching for updates on AI-related revenue and data center demand. While AMD's current valuation remains high with a PE ratio of 131.64, its strong margins and financial health are notable. Meyka AI gives AMD a "BUY" rating but projects near-term weakness before multi-year gains, highlighting potential volatility driven by earnings guidance.

feed.title: Logitech's Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
feed.summary: Logitech International S.A. (LOGI) reported strong financial results for its third quarter of fiscal 2026, with non-GAAP earnings per share of $1.93, exceeding Zacks Consensus Estimate by 7.8% and increasing 21% year-over-year. Revenues reached $1.42 billion, surpassing consensus by 0.7% and rising 6% year-over-year. The company also initiated Q4 and full fiscal year 2026 guidance, projecting continued revenue growth and operating profit.

feed.title: Jennifer Garner's Baby Food Startup An Acquisition 'Play,' Say Analysts Ahead of $208 Million IPO
feed.summary: Analysts are calling Jennifer Garner's organic baby food company, Once Upon A Farm, an acquisition "play" ahead of its $208 million IPO. Hedgeye Risk Management analyst Bennett Cheer suggests the company, co-founded by Garner and CEO John Foraker, is being built for eventual acquisition by a larger consumer products company, citing its strong growth rate and the CEO's past success with Annie's Homegrown. The company aims for a $764 million valuation but faces tariff risks, primarily from its sourcing in Mexico and South America.

feed.title: The Truth About Crown Castle Inc.: Is This ‘Boring’ Stock Low?Key a 5G Power Play?
feed.summary: This article examines Crown Castle Inc. (CCI), a "boring" but crucial infrastructure company that owns cell towers and fiber for 5G in the US. It discusses CCI's business model as a landlord to major wireless carriers, its performance as a REIT with a focus on dividends, and compares it to competitor American Tower. The piece suggests that while not flashy, CCI could be a solid long-term investment for those seeking stable income and exposure to digital infrastructure growth, rather than fast gains.

feed.title: Stride (LRN) Jumps 14% on Earnings Blowout
feed.summary: Stride Inc. (NYSE:LRN) saw its stock jump 14.25% after reporting strong second-quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings. The company's net income increased by 3% to $99.5 million, and revenues grew by 7.5% to $631.3 million, driven by a 7.8% jump in enrollments. Stride Inc. also reaffirmed its full fiscal 2026 revenue outlook of $2.48 billion to $2.55 billion.

feed.title: HIVE Digital Technologies Announces Filing and Mailing of Annual General and Special Meeting Materials :: HIVE Digital Technologies
feed.summary: HIVE Digital Technologies has announced the filing and mailing of materials for its upcoming Annual General and Special Meeting, scheduled for March 5, 2026. Shareholders will vote on the election of directors, appointment of auditors, amended incentive stock option and restricted share unit plans, and an amendment to shareholder quorum requirements. The Board unanimously recommends voting "FOR" all proposed resolutions, and shareholders are encouraged to vote by the March 3, 2026 deadline.

feed.title: Annaly Capital Management stock hits 52-week high at $24.41 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Annaly Capital Management's stock reached a new 52-week high of $24.41, reflecting strong performance and investor confidence. The company has delivered a 40.26% total return over the past year and pays a substantial 11.49% dividend yield, maintaining payments for 29 consecutive years. Recent developments include exceeding Q3 2025 earnings expectations, a dividend declaration, an analyst upgrade to "Buy," and a Chief Legal Officer transition.

feed.title: Navient Corp stock hits 52-week low at $10.52 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Navient Corp's stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of $10.52, reflecting a 25.51% decline over the past year. This downturn is attributed to challenging market conditions and issues within the student loan servicing industry. The company also reported a significant earnings per share loss in Q3 2025, although it raised its full-year loan origination guidance.

feed.title: David Beckham signs 20-year fragrance pact expected to top $50M sales
feed.summary: Interparfums (NASDAQ: IPAR) has signed a 20-year exclusive worldwide license agreement with David Beckham to develop, produce, and distribute fragrances under his brand, expecting annual sales to exceed $50 million. Interparfums will assume full global responsibility on April 1, 2028, and plans to launch a new signature fragrance by the end of 2029. This strategic partnership, made in collaboration with Authentic Brands Group, aims to strengthen Beckham's global fragrance presence and follows Interparfums' recent operational milestones and extended brand partnerships.
